TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_myugi, title = myugi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/myugi} }

S.FORM: == myugi == Laqi mrkyas ru krakis qalang ga tehok kawas naha la ru, masuq lga msqun mnbux qwaw ro mstopaw myugi sinqqas.
== myugi == Laqi mrkyas ru krakis qalang ga tehok kawas naha la ru, masuq lga msqun mnbux qwaw ro mstopaw myugi sinqqas.
S.PHON: == mjuɣi == laqi mrkjas~ɕ ru krakis~ɕ qalaŋ ɣa teħok kawas~ɕ naħa la ru, mas~ɕuq lɣa ms~ɕqun mnβux qwaw ro ms~ɕtopaw mjuɣi s~ɕinqqas~ɕ.
